description_long: This rifle features a compact, angular design with a metallic gray finish and black accents. The body is robust, with a squared receiver and a prominent barrel extending from the front. The stock is minimalistic, with two angled supports that give it a futuristic appearance, and the grip area is integrated into the main body. The rifle has a pair of parallel prongs at the rear, likely representing a unique charging or mounting system. The overall construction suggests a modern, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments, with a focus on durability and ease of handling. The surface is smooth and hard, with a slight sheen indicating a metal or polymer exterior.
description: A compact, angular rifle with a metallic gray body, black accents, and a minimalistic, futuristic stock. Features a prominent barrel and integrated grip, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel opening, angular supports of the stock, and the symmetrical design of the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the barrel, the compact body, and the parallel prongs at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the minimalistic stock and the closed back of the receiver, with the angled supports clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the barrel, body, and rear prongs from the other side.
